author.bio:
We believe the internet has become humanity's most important technology. 
We build protocols, systems, and tools to improve how it works.
author.name: Protocol Labs

content.text: ‘Tis the season for🎁🎁🎁and we have one of our own: We're happy to announce the launch of the new Protocol Labs Research site! https://research.protocol.ai/
